special_mechanics.name: Dual Mode Gameplay
special_mechanics.description: Game switches between top-view vertical scrolling flight segments and side-scrolling ground segments. Player character flies with magical wings in vertical sections and walks/climbs/jumps in horizontal palace sections.

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Player gun improves through 4 levels in NES version; first power-up increases player speed, subsequent levels improve firepower. Leveling also improves bomb speed and range. Turtle Dove transformation grants special wide shot capability.

special_mechanics.name: Flight System (Vertical Sections)
special_mechanics.description: Player controls flying character with wings, shoots at airborne enemies and drops bombs at ground targets in top-view vertical scrolling segments.

special_mechanics.name: Ground Movement (Horizontal Sections)
special_mechanics.description: Player character walks, crouches, climbs ladders, and jumps within palace environments during side-scrolling segments.

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: No precise physics values documented in available source. Wikipedia provides gameplay mechanics and design overview but lacks quantitative movement parameters, gravity values, or technical implementation details. Source is qualitative only.
